title: Capstone Project Architecture & Deployment
description: Test your understanding of building production-ready AI agents, selecting database backends, and deployment architectures.

title: LLMs, ML, DL & DS Concepts
topic: Intro to LLMs, ML, DL, DS
description: Test your baseline understanding of Machine Learning, Deep Learning neural networks, and Large Language Model architectures.

title: Multi-Agent Workflows
description: Learn how to design robust Agentic AI routing, state orchestration, and structured multi-agent collaboration flows.

title: Python Structures & Lists
description: Test your comprehension of Python built-in data types, list comprehensions, and generators.

title: Relational Databases & SQL
description: Master relational databases, index optimizations, ACID transaction properties, and SQL execution strategies.

title: Python & FastAPI Deep Dive
description: Master FastAPI concepts including async/await concurrency, Pydantic data validation, and dependency injection patterns.

title: AI Agents & Agentic Workflows
description: Learn about agent architectures, routing, planning, tool usage, reflection, and multi-agent collaboration frameworks.

title: System Scaling & High-Level Architecture
description: Learn scaling strategies, load balancing algorithms, database replication, and CDN mechanics.

title: Agentic AI Foundations Assessment
description: Learn the core differences between traditional software, machine learning, generative AI, LLMs, and multi-step Agentic AI workflows.
